comment: P3 verifier calibration (Constitution Rule 3 / caution.md C-039 PECR pre-consent lane). The candidate cites a tracker_request_pre_consent network event for connect.facebook-pixel.example that the browser lane never actually observed: bundle.browser.observed contains only a www.google-analytics.com entry. breach/verifiers/network-event.js must refuse this fabricated event: verifyCandidate must return verified:false with code network_event_not_found. Run via: node breach/verifiers/quote-match.js --calibrate. A finding is emitted only when the fabrication is correctly rejected.
